title: New Income Tax ordinance to exempt FIIs, BIS from tax on interest and capital gains from govt securities
description: President Droupadi Murmu promulgated the Income-tax (Amendment) Ordinance, 2026, which amends the Income-tax Act, 2025. The changes will be deemed effective from April 1, 2026.

title: RBI lowers FY27 GDP forecast to 6.6%, sees inflation rising to 5.1% amid oil shock, global risks
description: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra said West Asia tensions, elevated crude oil prices, supply chain disruptions, and weather risks have increased uncertainty around India’s growth and inflation outlook.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of Utilis Fund
description: SEBI passes an order in the matter of Utilis Fund, addressing regulatory compliance and enforcement actions related to the fund's operations.

title: Order in the Matter of Argentum Dynamic Alternative Investment Fund
description: SEBI enforcement order against Argentum Dynamic Alternative Investment Fund for violations of SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012, with directions and/or penalties issued by the adjudicating authority.

title: SEBI Order: Market Access Restrained for 17 Entities in Veerkrupa Jewellers Matter
description: SEBI has restrained 17 individuals and entities from accessing the securities market for 3 to 5 years in connection with M/s Veerkrupa Jewellers Limited, via order dated May 29, 2026.

title: SEBI Order Against Suzlon Energy Limited for Financial Misrepresentation and PFUTP/LODR Violations
description: SEBI issues enforcement order under Section 15-I(3) of the SEBI Act and Section 23-I(3) of the SCRA against Suzlon Energy Limited and four officials for alleged misrepresentation in financial statements and violations of PFUTP and LODR Regulations during FY 2014-15 to FY 2020-21.

title: SEBI Order Against Mr. Nishaan Singh (Sanbun Investments) for Unregistered Portfolio Management Services
description: SEBI passes fresh order against Mr. Nishaan Singh, Proprietor of Sanbun Investments, following SAT remand to reassess quantum of funds received for unregistered portfolio management services and determine refund and debarment period.

title: Order in the Matter of IndoStar Credit Fund
description: SEBI enforcement order dated May 22, 2026 in the matter of IndoStar Credit Fund, addressing regulatory compliance issues related to the fund's operations.

title: SEBI Order Against Ventureland Asia Advisors Services LLP
description: SEBI enforcement order against Ventureland Asia Advisors Services LLP for violations of securities laws and regulations governing investment advisory or portfolio management services.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of Domus Capital LLP
description: SEBI enforcement order against Domus Capital LLP for violations of securities laws, directing specific penalties or remedial actions as determined by the adjudicating authority.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of India Electronic Development Fund
description: SEBI enforcement order concerning the India Electronic Development Fund (IEDF), an SEBI-registered Alternative Investment Fund focused on the electronics and semiconductor sector.

title: SEBI Order in the Matter of Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Limited - Fund Diversion and RPT Non-Disclosure
description: SEBI order pursuant to Bombay High Court directions concerning Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Limited, its promoters Shishir Bajaj and Kushagra Bajaj, involving alleged diversion of over ₹1,189 crore and non-disclosure of related party transactions.

title: SEBI Order Against Future Retail Limited Directors for Fraud, Misleading Disclosures and Fund Diversion
description: SEBI passes a 222-page enforcement order against 11 noticees including Kishore Biyani and other top executives of Future Retail Limited for misleading disclosures, understatement of debt, non-disclosure of related party transactions, and diversion of company funds.

title: SEBI Order on Front Running by Prijesh Kurani and Others
description: SEBI issued an enforcement order against 7 noticees including Prijesh Kurani and associates for front running trades of big client Anustup Trading Private Limited during January 2022 to February 2023.

title: SEBI Order Against Unregistered Investment Advisors Running Telegram Channels Intraday Jackpot and Professional Day Trading Institute
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Akshay Kumar and five others for operating unregistered investment advisory and research analyst services through Telegram channels, collecting fees and making fraudulent profit claims.

title: Final Order Against Arun Panchariya in GDR Issue by Winsome Yarns Ltd.
description: SEBI issues a final adjudication order against Arun Panchariya for his role in fraudulent Global Depository Receipt (GDR) transactions by Winsome Yarns Ltd., following remand by SAT to recompute the penalty quantum.

title: Order Against M/s AFCO Capital India Private Limited - Merchant Banker Restrictions
description: SEBI issues order against AFCO Capital India Private Limited (SEBI Reg. No. INM000012555) for violations of Merchant Bankers Regulations, Intermediaries Regulations, PFUTP and PIT Regulations following inspection for April 2022 to August 2024.

title: Order in the matter of Front-running trades of Big Client - Sarvottam Securities Private Limited by multiple entities
description: SEBI order against four individuals — Mr. Sunny Bhatia, Mrs. Surbhi Chopra Bhatia, Mrs. Mamta Rani, and Mr. Kumar Ashok — for front-running trades of Big Client Sarvottam Securities Pvt. Ltd. in equity derivatives during January 2018 to December 2022.

title: SEBI Order Against Retro Green Revolution Limited - Price Manipulation and Market Fraud
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against 21 noticees including promoters and associates of Retro Green Revolution Limited for price manipulation, volume creation, and fraudulent trading activities on BSE.

title: Order Against Cash Cow Broking & Advisory Solutions for Unregistered Investment Advisory Activities
description: SEBI passes directions against Cash Cow Broking & Advisory Solutions and its partners for conducting investment advisory services without registration, ordering refund of fees collected from investors.

title: SEBI Order Against Arcotech Limited: Fund Diversion and Financial Statement Misrepresentation
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Arcotech Limited and 13 related entities for alleged fund diversion of Rs.14.15 crores, fictitious transactions, and misrepresentation of financial statements across FY 2016-17 to 2020-21.

title: SEBI Order Against Mediaone Global Entertainment Ltd. for Fund Diversion and Financial Manipulation
description: SEBI issues enforcement order against Mediaone Global Entertainment Ltd. and its directors for alleged fund diversion and financial irregularities linked to Eros International Media Limited, involving a write-off of ₹63.61 crore.

title: Order in the matter of trading activities of certain entities in the scrip of DU Digital Technologies Limited (now DU Digital Global Limited)
description: SEBI order against 27 entities for employing deceptive trading strategies and contributing to artificial price and volume manipulation in DU Digital scrip during August 26, 2021 to March 31, 2023.
